zh.lifeSummary: 當Hannah Richardson於1689年5月6日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本時，她的父親Nathaniel Richardson38歲，母親Mary Peacock32歲。她於1713年6月10日與Ensign Timothy Baldwin在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可斯同哈姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1766年之後在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hannah Richardson于1689年5月6日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本时，她的父亲Nathaniel Richardson38岁，母亲Mary Peacock32岁。她于1713年6月10日与Ensign Timothy Baldwin在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可斯同哈姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1766年之后在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼。

nameMeanings.name: Richardson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Richard + -son. This surname is also very common among African Americans. Compare Ritson .
Americanized form (and a Swedish variant) of Swedish Richardsson or Rikardsson: patronymic from the personal name Richard , Rikard.
Americanized form of Norwegian and Danish Richardsen or Norwegian Rikardsen, cognates of 2 above.

variants.name: Richerson
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Richardson   or perhaps a patronymic from   Richer  .

variants.name: Richard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Jacques, Andre, Marcel, Pierre, Leonce, Normand, Camille, Lucien, Gilles, Henri.

English, French, West Indian (mainly Haiti), German, and Dutch: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements rīc ‘power(ful)’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. The Middle English forms were Richard and Rikard, respectively Parisian Old French and Old Picard pronunciations of the ancient Germanic name. Middle English Rikard gives rise to the pet form Rick , whilst Richard has given the pet forms Richie and Rich . Both produced rhyming pet forms, Dick and Hick for Rikard and Hitch for Richard.

History: The LA Richard families are mainly descended from Acadian refugees in the second half of the 18th century. — This surname is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Richeson
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Richardson  , but compare   Richerson  .

variants.name: Ritson
meanings: variant of Richson, a shortened form of Richardson . The name may sometimes have been confused with or assimilated to Rushton .
in southern England perhaps a habitational name from Ritson, in Halwell (Devon).

nameMeanings.name: Hannah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the mother of the prophet Samuel (1 Samuel 1:2), Hebrew Hanna. It is derived from a Hebrew word meaning ‘He (i.e. God) has favoured me (i.e. with a child)’. See also Anne . This form of the name was taken up as a given name by the Puritans in the 16th and 17th centuries and remained popular until the late 19th century. Thereafter it fell somewhat from favour but has enjoyed a massive revival since the 1990s.

variants.name: Hanna
meanings: Either the biblical name ( see Hannah ) or a short form of Johanna .

variants.name: Hana
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Hannah Richardson was born on 6 May 1689, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Nathaniel Richardson, was 38 and her mother, Mary Peacock, was 32. She married Ensign Timothy Baldwin on 10 June 1713, in Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died after 1766, in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

Elle a épousé Ensign Timothy Baldwin le 10 juin 1713, à Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 1766, à Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hannah Richardson am 6. Mai 1689 in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nathaniel Richardson 38 und ihre Mutter Mary Peacock 32. Sie hat am 10. Juni 1713 in Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Ensign Timothy Baldwin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1766 in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Richardson è nata il il 6 maggio 1689 nel Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Nathaniel Richardson, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Mary Peacock, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Ensign Timothy Baldwin il 10 giugno 1713, nel Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 1766, nel Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.Dudley, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Col: イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーウオルセスターダドリー
ja.lifeSummary: Hannah Richardsonが1689年5月6日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンで生まれた時，父Nathaniel Richardsonは38歳，母Mary Peacockは32歳であった。1713年6月10日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスストーネハムでEnsign Timothy Baldwinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1766年以後にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーで死去した。

ko.Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay C: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 스톤함
ko.Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번
ko.Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Coloni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이
ko.Dudley, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 워스스터 드들리
ko.lifeSummary: Hannah Richardson(이)가 1689년 5월 6일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nathaniel Richardson(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Peacock(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1713년 6월 10일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 스톤함에서 Ensign Timothy Baldwin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1766년 이후 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Richardson nasceu em 6 de maio de 1689, em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Nathaniel Richardson, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Mary Peacock, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Ensign Timothy Baldwin em 10 de junho de 1713, em Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1766, em Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay C: стоунэам, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Coloni: массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Dudley, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Col: дудли, ворсестир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hannah Richardson родилась 6 мая 1689 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Nathaniel Richardson было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Peacock, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ensign Timothy Baldwin 10 июня 1713 г. в местности стоунэам, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла после 1766 г. в местности массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hannah Richardson nació el 6 de mayo de 1689, en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Nathaniel Richardson, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Mary Peacock, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Ensign Timothy Baldwin el 10 de junio de 1713, en Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió después de 1766, en Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
